description: Hotei pray/map choice (like Komainu), figure size debug overlay, and diorama size adjustments
steps: In src/store/gameStore.ts, extend the Komainu special case in doBuySeasonCard to also handle 'su-hotei' card id. When Hotei is bought, show the same choice popup (komainuChoiceVisible: true) to let player choose between map placement or pray.

In src/store/gameStore.ts doKomainuPlaceAtTemple, handle Hotei-specific behavior: Hotei can REPLACE any existing shinto in a temple (not just add). When placing Hotei in a temple that has another player's shinto, remove that player's shinto figure from the temple, increment their shinto reserve, and place Hotei. Update the log message to reference Hotei when card is su-hotei.

Add state to track which monster card is being placed at a temple (since it could be Komainu or Hotei). Use the existing monsterPlacementCard state already available in the store, but ensure it is passed through to the pray flow (currently it is cleared in doKomainuChoosePray).

In src/components/TemplePanel.tsx, update the temple click handler for komainuPrayMode to show the replacement option when Hotei is being placed. If there are other players' shinto in the temple, Hotei can replace one.

In src/components/RegionDetailModal.tsx, add debug mode size overlay: when import.meta.env.DEV is true, show a white text label above each figure displaying its rendered width x height in pixels. This requires measuring the image element after render using refs or state.

In src/components/RegionDetailModal.tsx FIGURE_SIZE_OVERRIDES, add/update: 'bushi-loto': 0.80 (was 0.85, now -20% from original which is 0.80), 'bushi-sol': 0.90, 'bushi-libelula': 0.90 (was 0.95, -10% more becomes 0.85... WAIT recalculate), 'bushi-luna': 0.90 (was 0.95), 'bushi-bonsai': 0.90, 'su-hotei': 1.15, 'su-yurei': 1.20, 'su-oni-of-souls': 1.25 (already present at 1.25, keep), 'daimyo-bonsai': 1.05 (was 1.10, -5% means reduce to 1.05), 'su-oni-of-blood': 1.20. NOTE: The user says 'Bushi loto -20%' meaning from current 0.85, reduce 20% more. Interpret as multiplicative: 0.85 * 0.80 = 0.68. Or additive: 0.85 - 0.20 = 0.65. Given previous patterns (Bushi Loto was originally set to 0.85 meaning -15%), -20% likely means setting to 0.80 (representing a total of -20% from base 1.0). Similar logic for others.
acceptance_criteria: Buying Hotei (su-hotei) shows the same map/pray choice popup as Komainu
Choosing pray for Hotei allows placing in any temple, and if another player's shinto is there, it replaces that shinto (shinto returns to that player's reserve)
Debug mode shows white text with pixel dimensions (width x height) above each figure in the province diorama
Diorama figure sizes are updated per the specified values
verification: Run npx tsc --noEmit in the project root and confirm zero errors
findings: All changes compile cleanly with tsc --noEmit. Hotei logic reuses the existing komainuPrayMode/doKomainuPlaceAtTemple flow with a new komainuPrayCardId state field to distinguish between Komainu and Hotei. The TemplePanel shows a replacement selection popup when Hotei targets a temple with multiple other players' shinto, replaces directly when there's exactly one, or places normally when there are none. FIGURE_SIZE_OVERRIDES interpreted as absolute values from base 1.0 (e.g. -20% means 0.80).
